testcase.name: test_new_user_has_trial_credits
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_18_demo_and_push.py:63: in new_user assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"register failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: register failed: 429 {"detail":"Demasiados registros desde tu red. Esperá 24h o contactanos."} E assert 429 in (200, 201) E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_new_user_app_builder_flow
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_18_demo_and_push.py:63: in new_user assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"register failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: register failed: 429 {"detail":"Demasiados registros desde tu red. Esperá 24h o contactanos."} E assert 429 in (200, 201) E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
